insight: U of I is an R1 research institution where 70% to 75% of undergraduates participate in research, heavily supported by external grants and unique facilities like the Taylor Wilderness Research Station.
implication: Applicants interested in STEM, natural resources, and agricultural sciences have unparalleled access to well-funded, hands-on field research early in their academic careers [cite: 2, 3, 7, 8].
